history.content: Completed — the proposal execution is finished and verified. ### ✅ What was changed Modified files: - `src/gateway/routes/chat.router.ts` - `src/gateway/agents-runtime/subagent-executor.ts` - `src/gateway/tools/defs/cis-system.ts` - `src/gateway/prompt-context.ts` ### ✅ Functional outcomes - Implemented **fail-open behavior** for `switch_model` execution so a `switch_model` failure does **not** abort the rest of tool execution. - Enforced **guaranteed tool_result pairing** on `switch_model` failure path, preserving deterministic `tool_use` ↔ `tool_result` contract. - Aligned tool/prompt wording with actual runtime behavior, including revert-language clarification: - from codex-specific auto-revert wording - to session-primary model auto-revert wording. ### ✅ Verification - Ran `npm run build`. - First build failed due to a temporary TypeScript syntax issue (extra brace near `switch_model` handling in subagent executor). - Fixed the syntax issue and rebuilt. - Final build passed (`tsc` exit code `0`). ### ✅ Task completion log - Wrote a full `task_complete` note with all edits/results/findings. - Marked final plan step complete. No new files were created and no files were deleted.
